The following card sets are the sets that have been released in English. These are the bulk of the cards that you will find in various tournements and trading with your various friends

English Sets

Logo Icon Set Name Number of Cards Release Date
Delta Reign 210 November 6th 2026
30th Celebration 210 September 16th 2026
Pitch Black 130 July 17th 2026
Chaos Rising 122 May 22nd 2026
Perfect Order 124 March 27th 2026
Ascended Heroes 295 January 30th 2026
